titleStmt.title: SII 4.1187: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1187. (A.R. No. 310 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL BETWEEN THE SEVENTH AND THE EIGHTH PILLARS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsarivarmmapermmāna
ḍigalu gaṁgākāvērīparyyaṁtadharitrīpati saptamōviṣṇuvarddhanulaina tribhuvanacakravartti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara pravarddhamāna
vijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 36 gu śāhi cōḍamaṇḍalamuna Ūyakoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭṭi maruttuvakuḍi maruttukuḍayā māśilā
maṇiyaina mālanarāyuṇḍu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍavartti lōhapappara diviya 1 ṇṭiki nācaṁdrārkkamu neyu sa
riyiṁpaṁgalavārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla nāvaya pōtabōla dāmaya doḍḍibōla bādaya cadukana
kommaya talarāśi nāvaya peddibōla nāvaya cāmabōla bhīmaya verasinavāru vūṁṭagāṁ gāṭabōla nāvaya vasamuna vi
ḍicina yenumalu yiruvayēnu nityapaḍi vōyaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē mānayu 1 . ḍakarēmi rājēṁdracōḍa
cāryyalikhitaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 4.1187 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
